description: A DHS graphic in the format of an airline ticket or boarding pass. The top portion is a white ticket stub bordered by red rules, with a vertical barcode down the left edge and a perforated dashed edge on the right; the DHS seal sits centered at the top. In large navy condensed sans-serif caps the ticket reads 'FREE TICKET' on the first line and a larger 'HOME' on the second. Below, on a dark navy textured background, a yellow headline reads '$1,000 to Self-Deport,' followed by white body text: 'Non-criminal illegal aliens can access travel assistance on their own terms to avoid arrest and earn a stipend for returning home.' A white line states 'There is no excuse to not self deport.' At the bottom is a red pill-shaped button reading 'Visit DHS.gov/CBPHome.' The color scheme is red, white, and blue.
notable_text: FREE TICKET HOME | $1,000 to Self-Deport | There is no excuse to not self deport. | Visit DHS.gov/CBPHome
